description: A reader should fail sync when the seed emits an unsolicited OBJECT after HELLO but before MANIFEST or HEADS establishes sync context.

assertions.description: Reader rejects OBJECT because the seed sent it before any WANT request and before MANIFEST or HEADS established sync context.
Reader does not write a manifest or verified object set after the unsolicited OBJECT session violation.

notes: Extends the simulator matrix with a post-HELLO, pre-context negative interop case.
The seed still uses the normal peer-store transcript generator, but the harness moves the first OBJECT ahead of MANIFEST and WANT.
